auth.label: API Key
auth.description: ClickMeeting API key sent in the X-Api-Key header. Generate or view it in ClickMeeting account settings: https://account-panel.clickmeeting.com/account/details#api.

actions.name: create_conference
actions.description: Create a ClickMeeting meeting or webinar room.

name.description: The room name visible to ClickMeeting attendees.

permanentRoom.description: Whether to create a permanent room instead of a one-time scheduled room.

accessType.description: The ClickMeeting room access type: 1 for open access, 2 for password access, or 3 for token access.

customRoomUrlName.description: The custom room URL slug to use instead of one derived from name.

lobbyDescription.description: The UTF-8 lobby description shown before the room starts.

lobbyEnabled.description: Whether the room lobby is enabled.

startsAt.description: The room start date, either YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss or ISO 8601.

anyOf.description: The duration string accepted by ClickMeeting.
The duration value accepted by ClickMeeting.

duration.description: The room duration in ClickMeeting format, such as 1:20 or 0:20.

timezone.description: The time zone name for the room start date, such as America/New_York.

password.description: The room password used when accessType is 2.

enabled.description: Whether registration is enabled for the room.

template.description: The ClickMeeting registration template identifier, from 1 to 3.

registration.description: The ClickMeeting registration settings for a room.

showOnPersonalPage.description: Whether the room is shown on the personal page.

connectionTesterEnabled.description: Whether the connection tester is enabled.

phonegatewayEnabled.description: Whether the phone gateway is enabled.

roomInviteButtonEnabled.description: Whether the invite button is enabled in the room.

socialMediaSharingEnabled.description: Whether social media sharing is enabled.

thankYouPageUrl.description: The thank-you page URL configured for the room.

encryptionEnabled.description: Whether end-to-end encryption is enabled for the room.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a ClickMeeting room.

anyOf.description: The room start date when provided.
The room end date when provided.

conference.description: A normalized ClickMeeting room with the original response preserved in raw.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after creating a ClickMeeting room.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting a ClickMeeting room.

result.description: The delete result returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after deleting a ClickMeeting room.

actions.name: generate_access_tokens
actions.description: Generate access tokens for a token-protected ClickMeeting room.

howMany.description: The number of access tokens to generate, up to 1000.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for generating ClickMeeting access tokens.

anyOf.description: The email address the token was sent to when available.
The first token use date when available.

raw.description: The raw ClickMeeting access token object.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after generating ClickMeeting access tokens.

actions.name: get_conference
actions.description: Get details for a ClickMeeting room.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a ClickMeeting room.

anyOf.description: The room start date when provided.
The room end date when provided.

conference.description: A normalized ClickMeeting room with the original response preserved in raw.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a ClickMeeting room.

actions.name: get_session
actions.description: Get details for a ClickMeeting room session.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting a ClickMeeting room session.

anyOf.description: The maximum visitor count during the session.
The total visitor count during the session.
The attendee UID returned by ClickMeeting.
The attendee rating comment when available.

attendees.description: The attendees embedded in a session detail response.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when getting a ClickMeeting room session.

actions.name: list_access_tokens
actions.description: List generated access tokens for a ClickMeeting room.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting access tokens.

anyOf.description: The email address the token was sent to when available.
The first token use date when available.

raw.description: The raw ClickMeeting access token object.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting access tokens.

actions.name: list_all_recordings
actions.description: List all ClickMeeting recordings for the connected account.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing all ClickMeeting recordings.

anyOf.description: The room identifier associated with the recording.
The recording start date returned by ClickMeeting.
The ISO recording start date when provided.
The recording file size returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing all ClickMeeting recordings.

actions.name: list_chats
actions.description: List ClickMeeting chat archives available for download.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting chat archives.

anyOf.description: The room name associated with the chat.
The URL that can be used to download the chat archive.

items.description: A normalized ClickMeeting chat export listing.

chats.description: The chat archive listings returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting chat archives.

actions.name: list_conference_recordings
actions.description: List recordings for a ClickMeeting room.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting room recordings.

anyOf.description: The room identifier associated with the recording.
The recording start date returned by ClickMeeting.
The ISO recording start date when provided.
The recording file size returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting room recordings.

actions.name: list_conferences
actions.description: List active or inactive ClickMeeting rooms.

page.description: The page number for inactive room listings.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting rooms.

anyOf.description: The room start date when provided.
The room end date when provided.

items.description: A normalized ClickMeeting room with the original response preserved in raw.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting rooms.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting phone gateways.

anyOf.description: The country code for the phone gateway.

geo.description: The geographic metadata returned by ClickMeeting.

raw.description: The raw ClickMeeting phone gateway object.

items.description: A normalized ClickMeeting phone gateway number.

phoneGateways.description: The phone gateways returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting phone gateways.

actions.name: list_registrations
actions.description: List registrations for a ClickMeeting room by registration status.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting room registrations.

anyOf.description: The session identifier associated with the registration.

fields.description: The registration form fields returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting registrations.

actions.name: list_session_attendees
actions.description: List attendees for a ClickMeeting room session.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting session attendees.

anyOf.description: The attendee UID returned by ClickMeeting.
The attendee rating comment when available.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting session attendees.

actions.name: list_session_registrations
actions.description: List registrations for a specific ClickMeeting room session.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting session registrations.

anyOf.description: The session identifier associated with the registration.

fields.description: The registration form fields returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting session registrations.

actions.name: list_sessions
actions.description: List sessions for a ClickMeeting room.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting room sessions.

anyOf.description: The maximum visitor count during the session.
The total visitor count during the session.
The attendee UID returned by ClickMeeting.
The attendee rating comment when available.

attendees.description: The attendees embedded in a session detail response.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting room sessions.

actions.name: list_time_zones
actions.description: List ClickMeeting time zones, optionally filtered by country code.

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to filter time zones.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing ClickMeeting time zones.

timeZones.description: The time zone names returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing ClickMeeting time zones.

actions.name: ping
actions.description: Check ClickMeeting API availability for the connected API key.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for checking ClickMeeting API status.

ping.description: The ping response value returned by ClickMeeting.

actions.name: register_participant
actions.description: Register a participant for a ClickMeeting room.

enabled.description: Whether ClickMeeting should send a confirmation email.

confirmationEmail.description: The optional ClickMeeting confirmation email settings.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for registering a ClickMeeting participant.

status.description: The registration status returned by ClickMeeting.

url.description: The participant room URL returned by ClickMeeting.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after registering a ClickMeeting participant.

name.description: The room name visible to ClickMeeting attendees.

permanentRoom.description: Whether to create a permanent room instead of a one-time scheduled room.

accessType.description: The ClickMeeting room access type: 1 for open access, 2 for password access, or 3 for token access.

customRoomUrlName.description: The custom room URL slug to use instead of one derived from name.

lobbyDescription.description: The UTF-8 lobby description shown before the room starts.

lobbyEnabled.description: Whether the room lobby is enabled.

startsAt.description: The room start date, either YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss or ISO 8601.

anyOf.description: The duration string accepted by ClickMeeting.
The duration value accepted by ClickMeeting.

duration.description: The room duration in ClickMeeting format, such as 1:20 or 0:20.

timezone.description: The time zone name for the room start date, such as America/New_York.

password.description: The room password used when accessType is 2.

enabled.description: Whether registration is enabled for the room.

template.description: The ClickMeeting registration template identifier, from 1 to 3.

registration.description: The ClickMeeting registration settings for a room.

showOnPersonalPage.description: Whether the room is shown on the personal page.

connectionTesterEnabled.description: Whether the connection tester is enabled.

phonegatewayEnabled.description: Whether the phone gateway is enabled.

roomInviteButtonEnabled.description: Whether the invite button is enabled in the room.

socialMediaSharingEnabled.description: Whether social media sharing is enabled.

thankYouPageUrl.description: The thank-you page URL configured for the room.

encryptionEnabled.description: Whether end-to-end encryption is enabled for the room.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for updating a ClickMeeting room.

anyOf.description: The room start date when provided.
The room end date when provided.

conference.description: A normalized ClickMeeting room with the original response preserved in raw.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after updating a ClickMeeting room.
